title: Project Management Specialist (6 months/PHARMA MNC) - West/up to $6500 #HAO
description:
Salary: up to $6500 + 250 transport allowance

Duration: 6 months contract

Working Days & Hours: Mon-Fri Office Hours

Location: Tuas (company pickup from Jurong East, Boon Lay, CCK, Woodlands, Tampines, Sengkang, Bishan, Paya Lebar, Yishun)

Job Description:

A. Project Governance Setup & Maintenance

• Set up and maintain governance structures for all BEx and site level projects.

• Develop and manage project templates, trackers, schedules, and reporting mechanisms.

• Ensure standardization and consistency across project management processes.

B. Portfolio Oversight & Tracking

• Track progress of all projects under governance, including:

o Critical projects from the Site Master Plan

o Lean and Six Sigma (Improve stage) projects

o One Plan initiatives

• Monitor timelines, milestones, risks, and action items.

• Escalate delays or issues through the appropriate governance channels.

C. Reporting & Communication

• Prepare concise weekly and monthly progress reports.

• Consolidate updates from workstream leads and present in a clear, structured format.

• Support preparation for leadership reviews, tier meetings, and project discussions.

D. Coordination & Follow Up

• Coordinate with cross functional teams to collect updates and maintain accurate project status.

• Follow up on outstanding actions, decisions, and deliverables.

• Support meeting logistics, including scheduling, agenda preparation, and documentation.

E. Documentation & Compliance

• Ensure all project documents (plans, charters, trackers, minutes) are up to date and stored in the correct location.

• Maintain audit ready documentation aligned with site and BEx requirements.

Job Requirements: Min Degree in Life Sciences w min 3-5 yrs of relevant project management experience, preferably from life science/pharmaceutical industry 

Interested candidates, please submit your resume to: allylok@recruitexpress.com.sg

Ally Audrey Lok Xin Woon

Recruit Express Pte Ltd (Healthcare & Lifescience)

Company EA Licence number : 99C4599

Personnel EA License: R21102307

allylok@recruitexpress.com.sg

postedCompany.description:
Established since 1996, Recruit Express has emerged as the leading staffing solutions provider that has set a proven track record for matching the right people to the right organization within the shortest time. With our vast network of resources, extensive databases and defined recruitment processes, we have been successfully bridging talented job seekers of the highest calibre to employers who only want the best in their teams.


In our relentless pursuit of excellent service, we have adopted best practices and dynamic growth strategies in expanding our operations across the Asia Pacific regions: We have offices in Singapore, Sydney, Hong Kong, Kuala Lumpur, Taipei, Shanghai, Beijing, Tokyo and Bangkok.

With 400 permanent committed consultants from various professional backgrounds and disciplines, we make a difference by delivering top-notch services to our clients and candidates alike.
